description_long: This object is a large, wooden half-pipe structure reminiscent of a skateboarding ramp, featuring a smooth, curved surface with high vertical walls on both ends. The exterior is constructed from light-colored wood panels, some of which show signs of dirt and wear, and the structure is reinforced with white metal railings along the top edges for safety. One side includes a staircase and platform, providing access to the upper level, while the opposite side displays a large red heart graffiti and a small tunnel-like opening at the base. The interior of the ramp is spacious and open, designed for traversal along its curved surface. The structure is elevated on sturdy wooden supports, and the overall build suggests it is intended for recreational use rather than water retention. Decorative elements such as graffiti and logos add to its urban aesthetic.
description: A large, wooden half-pipe ramp with white railings, stair access, graffiti, and a tunnel opening, designed for recreational use in an urban setting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height of the ramp, the staircase, and the upper platform with white railings.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the curved interior of the ramp, the smooth wooden surface, and the safety railings along the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring a large red heart graffiti, a tunnel opening at the base, and the staircase structure on the right.
description_view_3: View from the other end of the ramp, showing the curved interior, the supporting structure, and a small logo on the side.
